text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin isn't feeling very motivated, so I
take her to a shrine.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: We pray and draw our fortunes.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I was wondering where you were taking me, but a
shrine? Really?
choice_data_list: I thought it would make you feel better.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Sigh... If wishes really came true so easily, there would be literally no more suffering in the—

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Hang on... Taishin?! Is that you? Heeeey!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Oh, you two came to pray too?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
We're about to leave. We already prayed and got
our fortunes and everything.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Whaaat?! Don't go yet! Do it again so we can
make a wish together! Please? Pleeease?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Praying twice is better than once, and doing it
three times is even better! The more you pray, the
more likely your wish'll come true!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At Winning Ticket's insistence, we get back in line
to pray.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Oh, gods—and the Buddha too! Grant my wiiiish!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
This is a Shinto shrine, Ticket. The Buddha isn't
here.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: ...Why the heck am I even doing this?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Hey, what fortunes did everyone get? I got "good
fortune"!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I got "modest fortune." Not bad. What about you,
Taishin?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: ...I got "great fortune."

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: It's not like it's super rare or anything.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
That's not true! Not everyone has great luck, after
all!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
If you combine it with my good luck and
Hayahide's modest luck, your wish will definitely
come true!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I'm sure you'll feel totally better in no time!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Ah, I suppose we should tell you. We actually
came here to pray for your good health.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
We want to race you when you're in top fighting
shape after all.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Did you two really...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Ugh, who asked you to do that?! You boneheads!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Afterward, it seems like their wishes come true
with Narita Taishin making a full recovery.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: ...I got "great misfortune."

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, yeah! They say you always get a "great
fortune" after drawing that one!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
However... it appears that they've run out of
fortunes.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Whaaat?! Does that mean Taishin's stuck with the
worst possible luck?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I don't really care, actually...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: But you should care! Oh, poor Taishiiin!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Geez... Shut up already! And stop crying!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Though she's able to calm Winning Ticket
afterward, Narita Taishin's condition
unfortunately doesn't improve.
